questions.question: Describe the basic concept of data hiding in text-based features and its applications.
questions.hint: Focus on the principles of data hiding and its uses

questions.question: What is the primary purpose of watermarking in data hiding, and how does it differ from other methods?
questions.hint: Explain the concept of watermarking and its significance in data security

questions.question: Explain the difference between simple digital methods and intuitive methods of data hiding. Provide an example of each.
questions.hint: Compare and contrast these two approaches to data hiding
